top_signals.title: Alphabet burnishes one of its best weapons in the battle for AI supremacy
top_signals.summary: The Google parent's homegrown silicon is a big advantage in the AI compute race.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: BlueBay sees near-term risk in Japan AI stocks followed by rally
top_signals.summary: AI-related shares are likely to correct over the next two months but the sector may rebound next year on the prospect of favorable U.S. policy measures, says one portfolio manager.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
